creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Anonymous <swell.k@gmail.com> writes:

> +. for f in ${VAAPI_PATCHES}
> +	@${PATCH} -Efsp1 -d ${WRKSRC} -i ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-vaapi-${VAAPI_VERSION}/patches/${PORTNAME}-${f}.patch
> +. endfor

Taking idea from ports/153437 one can also use EXTRA_PATCHES here.

--- b.diff begins here ---
diff --git multimedia/mplayer/Makefile multimedia/mplayer/Makefile
index 8f34f1a..d895a56 100644
--- multimedia/mplayer/Makefile
+++ multimedia/mplayer/Makefile
@@ -155,6 +155,9 @@ VAAPI_VERSION=	20101115
 VAAPI_PATCHES?=	vaapi vaapi-0.29 vaapi-gma500-workaround vdpau
 MASTER_SITES+=	http://www.splitted-desktop.com/~gbeauchesne/${PORTNAME}-vaapi/:vaapi
 DISTFILES+=	${PORTNAME}-vaapi-${VAAPI_VERSION}${EXTRACT_SUFX}:vaapi
+.for f in ${VAAPI_PATCHES}
+EXTRA_PATCHES+=	${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-vaapi-${VAAPI_VERSION}/patches/${PORTNAME}-${f}.patch
+.endfor
 EXTRA_PATCHES+=	${PATCHDIR}/extra-vaapi-patch-libvo-stats.c
 LIB_DEPENDS+=	va.1:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/libva
 .endif
@@ -247,10 +250,8 @@ pre-everything::
 
 pre-patch:
 .if defined(WITH_VAAPI)
-	@${ECHO_MSG} '===>  Applying VAAPI patches: ${VAAPI_PATCHES}'
-. for f in ${VAAPI_PATCHES}
-	@${PATCH} -Efsp1 -d ${WRKSRC} -i ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-vaapi-${VAAPI_VERSION}/patches/${PORTNAME}-${f}.patch
-. endfor
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|^+++ b/|+++ |' \
+		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-vaapi-${VAAPI_VERSION}/patches/*.patch
 .endif
 
 post-patch:
--- b.diff ends here ---
